name: List Fold

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: rezgi
releases.description:
Toggle fold/unfold on list items only, without affecting headings.

### Commands
- **Toggle fold top-level lists** — folds/unfolds root-level list items only
- **Toggle fold all list levels** — folds/unfolds every nested list item recursively

### Notes
- Compatible with the Outliner plugin
- Desktop only (uses CodeMirror 6 APIs)
releases.name: List Fold v1.0.0
